roles.ukcore: BT Specific: The internal national backbone architecture.
roles.colossus: BT Legacy/Flagship: The core IP transit network for the UK.
roles.dr: Distribution Router: Sits between the core and the regional sites.
roles.ar: Aggregation Router: Collects traffic from local exchanges into the backbone.
roles.sm: Service Management or Switch Module: Distribution level routing.
roles.interconnect: High-level peering point between BT and external ISPs/CDNs.
roles.vhsaccess: Virtual Hosting Service: Gateway to data centers and server farms.
roles.mspaccess: Managed Service Platform: Entry point for high-tier corporate VPNs.
roles.mspstart: Managed Service Platform: Primary session initiation/authentication node.
roles.manage: Management Network: Restricted nodes for internal hardware configuration.
roles.admin: Administration Gateway: Direct management interface for infrastructure.
roles.cmts[0-9]*: Cable Modem Termination System (Hardware managing local cable segments).
roles.uim: User Interface Module: Management interface or direct user-facing interactions.
roles.metacc: Metadata / Accounting Controller: Handles billing, usage data, and flow accounting.
roles.vpam: Virtual Path Access Manager: Secure management gateway or VPN termination point.

hardware_interfaces.pos[0-9]*: Packet over SONET: High-speed fiber (OC-standard) for core-to-core links.
hardware_interfaces.smds: Switched Multimegabit Data Service: Legacy high-speed WAN protocol.
hardware_interfaces.ngfl: Next Generation Fiber Link: High-capacity modern fiber interface.
hardware_interfaces.v[0-9]*: Virtual: Shorthand for virtual interface or link.
hardware_interfaces.lo[0-9]*: Loopback Interface: A virtual router ID used for management stability.
hardware_interfaces.is[1-9]: Infrastructure Server: Numerical designation for clustered service nodes.

services.ns: Nameserver: Part of the DNS infrastructure.
services.beeks\\-ic: Beeks Group: Low-latency infrastructure for Financial Markets.
services.aristanetworks\\-ic: Arista Networks: Direct peering for hardware vendor cloud services.
services.f5inc\\-ic: F5 Networks: Global load balancing and BIG-IP cloud delivery.
services.tiktokmxico: TikTok Mexico: Dedicated ingress for LATAM traffic.
services.rumbleusainc: Rumble: Video hosting platform (Alternative media delivery).
services.lambdainc: Lambda Labs: Specialized GPU/Deep Learning cloud provider.
services.qwiltinc: Qwilt: Edge Cloud / Open Caching for video delivery.
services.radauth: RADIUS Authentication: Verifies subscriber credentials/login rights.
services.radacct: RADIUS Accounting: Tracks session duration and data volume for billing.
services.radproxy: RADIUS Proxy: Forwards auth requests to specific regional/partner databases.
services.radl: RADIUS Logging or Local authentication node.
services.cauth: Centralized Authentication: Master credential database for the ISP.
services.cpelookup: CPE Identification API: Maps router MAC addresses to customer accounts.
services.firmware: Firmware Distribution: Hosts OS images for customer hardware.
services.firmwareadmin: Firmware Management: Administrative control panel for updates.
services.ldap: LDAP Directory: Centralized network users, nodes, and permissions.
services.ldapsitemaster: LDAP Master: Primary authority for the site-wide directory.
services.dhcp: Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol: Assigns IP addresses to routers.
services.syslog: System Logging: Centralized repository for hardware/security logs.
services.mailrelay: SMTP Relay: Internal mail handling for system alerts.
services.tada: Technical Architecture & Design Authority: Design/Management node.
services.iris: Internal Response/Information System: Network monitoring/health dashboard.
services.nfs: Network File System: High-speed storage for configs and data.
services.filer: Network File System: High-speed storage for configs and data.
services.clf: Common Log Format / Centralized Logging Facility: Aggregates logs.
services.rtr\\.api: Router API: Programmatic interface for automated configuration.
services.isp\\-provisioning: Provisioning Engine: 'First Boot' config server for hardware.
services.indnsc: Internet DNS Cluster: Resolves domain names for the national user base.
services.dnscache: Internal DNS Resolver: Dedicated to recursive DNS lookups.
services.webcache: Transparent caching servers used to reduce backbone latency.
services.webtest: Experimental or staging environment for web service delivery.
services.news\\-feed: Inbound data stream for news/Usenet synchronization.
services.ftp: File Transfer Protocol: Dedicated software/firmware update mirrors.
services.commserver: Communications Server: Dial-in, console, or legacy telnet access.
services.nmnfws: Network Management / Firewall Service: Security appliances.
services.apc: Access Power Control or Alternative Provider Connection.
services.voice\\.twelve99\\.net: Carrier Voice/VoIP: Dedicated transit for telephony.
services.sip: Session Initiation Protocol: Signaling gateway for voice/video calls.
services.rtp[1-9]: Real-time Transport Protocol: Specific media gateways for voice traffic.
services.nvidia\\-ic: NVIDIA: Direct backbone access for cloud gaming/AI compute.
services.digitallondon: Digital Realty: Major global data center provider.
services.digitalffm: Digital Realty: Major global data center provider.
services.aquacomms: Subsea Cable Operator: Direct hand-off for trans-Atlantic fiber.
services.link: Inter-Node Fiber: A dedicated transit path between facilities.

conditions.not\\-set\\-yet: Unassigned/Null Record (IP active but placeholder in DNS)
conditions.business\\.static: Static IP assigned to Business/Enterprise customers
conditions.customer: Leased Line/Dedicated Fiber: High-SLA business connections.
conditions.leasedline: Leased Line/Dedicated Fiber: High-SLA business connections.
conditions.ov: Origin/Overlay: underlying Easynet core transport layer.
conditions.isp: Internet Service Provider: part of the public-facing service.
